name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''

---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A description of the problem (e.g., "I need to access X but the API doesn't expose it").

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Links to Porsche API documentation, related issues, etc.
